QuickLearnUnknownStatus.Description: Unknown status received from QuickLearn procedure

StatusCheckFailure.Description: System Status Check failed during test

UnknownStatus.Description: Unknown, unaccounted for status during transmission test

OperatorResponseFailure.Description: Failed to get operator response during test

ODCancelGearTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for transmission to kick-down

ODCancelButtonTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for OverDrive lockout button

SpeedRationalityTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for Speed Rationality required speed

TorqueConverterClutchSlipTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for Torque Converter Clutch Slip required speed

TorqueConverterLockupPreconditionFail.Description: Conditions not correct to test TCC Lockout

TCClutchNoLockTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for torque converter clutch unlocked

TCCPartialLockTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for torque converter clutch partial lock state

TCCFullLockTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for torque converter clutch full lock state

TCCLockSolenoid.Description: Timeout waiting for TCC Lock Solenoid to engage

ParkShiftLeverPositionTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for Park shift lever position

ReverseShiftLeverPositionTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for Reverse shift lever position

NeutralShiftLeverPositionTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for Neutral shift lever position

DriveShiftLeverPositionTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for Drive shift lever position

LowShiftLeverPositionTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for Low shift lever position

Low3ShiftLeverPositionTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for 3 Low shift lever position

QuickLearnZeroSpeedTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for zero speed for QuickLearn

QuickLearnNeutralTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for shift lever to be in Neutral for QuickLearn

QuickLearnWaitForParkTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for shift lever to be in Park for QuickLearn

QuickLearnConditions.Description: Module indicates conditions not correct for quicklearn

ShifterModuleFaults.Description: Faults detected in the Shifter Module

AccelerateInReverseZeroSpeedTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for zero speed for AccelerateInReverse

AccelerateInReverseTimeout.Description: Timeout waiting for reverse gear or required speed for AccelerateInReverse

ElectronicRangeSelectPreconditionTimeout.Description: Electronic Range Select timeout waiting for cable connect

ElectronicRangeSelectOperatorResponseTim.Description: Electronic Range Select timeout waiting for operator response

Monitor23ShiftZeroSpeedTimeout.Description: 2-3 shift - Timeout waiting for zero speed

Monitor23ShiftCheckEngineRunningTimeout.Description: 2-3 Shift - Timeout waiting for engine running

Check23ShiftTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for 2-3 shift to occur

MaximumSpeed23ShiftExceededFailure.Description: Vehicle speed out of range for 2-3 shift test

MonitorEngineBrakeTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for engine braking to occur

ReleaseAcceleratorTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for operator to release throttle

ReleaseThrottleTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for operator to release throttle

KickDownPreconditionTimeoutFailure.Description: Conditions not correct to test transmission kickdown

KickDownPreconditionFail.Description: Preconditions not met for transmission kickdown test

EngineOffIgnitionOnTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for Engine off Ignition on

EngineOffIgnitionOffTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for Engine off Ignition off

StatusByteUpdateFailure.Description: Communication failure updating EOL status byte

StartBreakInCycleFail.Description: Communication failure starting torque converter break-in cycle

StopBreakInCycleFail.Description: Communication failure stoping torque converter break-in cycle

AllGearsLockStatesNotSeen.Description: Failed to observe all required gears or TCC Lock States

AllLockupStatesNotSeen.Description: All Torque Converter clutch lockup states not observed

TCCNoLockNotSeen.Description: Failed to observe TCC unlock state

TCCPartialLockNotSeen.Description: Failed to observe TCC partial lock state

TCCFullLockNotSeen.Description: Failed to observe TCC full lock state

MaxGearTCCFullLockNotSeen.Description: Maximum gear or TCC Full lock not seen

ParkShiftLeverPositionNotSeen.Description: Park shift lever position and/or display not observed

ReverseShiftLeverPositionNotSeen.Description: Reverse shift lever position and/or display not observed

NeutralShiftLeverPositionNotSeen.Description: Neutral shift lever position and/or display not observed

DriveShiftLeverPositionNotSeen.Description: Drive shift lever position and/or display not observed

LowShiftLeverPositionNotSeen.Description: Low shift lever position and/or display not observed

Low3ShiftLeverPositionNotSeen.Description: 3 Low shift lever position and/or display not observed

AllShiftLeverPositionsNotSeen.Description: Failed to observe all required shift lever positions and/or displays

TransAxleOilTemperatureOutOfRange.Description: Transmission oil temperature out of range

UplinesNotComplete.Description: Transmission upline tests not completed prior to rolls

UplineShiftLeverTest.Description: Transmission Upline: Shift lever upline test not completed prior to rolls

UplinePinionFactorProgramming.Description: Transmission Upline: Pinion factor programming not complete

StartQuickLearnFail.Description: Failed to start the QuickLearn procedure

QuickLearnRestartFail.Description: Failed to restart the QuickLearn procedure

QuickLearnFinishupFail.Description: Failed to complete the QuickLearn procedure

QuickLearnOilTooCold.Description: Transmission oil temp too cold for QuickLearn

QuickLearnOilTooHot.Description: Transmission oil temp too hot for QuickLearn

QuickLearnRPMTooLow.Description: Engine RPM too low for QuickLearn

QuickLearnNotInNeutral.Description: Transmission not in Neutral during QuickLearn

QuickLearnNotInOverdrive.Description: Transmission not in Drive during QuickLearn

StartModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failure to start sending tester present messages to TCM

StopModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failure to stop sending tester present messages to TCM

SpeedRationalityFail.Description: Vehicle speed does not match rolls

VINMismatch.Description: Module VIN does not match Broadcast

PartNumberMismatch.Description: TCM Module part number does not match Broadcast

UpdateStatusRegister.Description: Failed to update EOL Status byte

TorqueConverterSlipTolerance.Description: Torque Converter Clutch out of tolerance

ElectronicRangeSelectDownTimeout.Description: Electronic Range Select timeout waiting for shift lever Down position

ElectronicRangeSelectUpTimeout.Description: Electronic Range Select timeout waiting for shift lever Up position

ElectronicRangeSelectReleaseTimeout.Description: Electronic Range Select timeout waiting for shift lever Release position

ElectronicRangeSelectDownFailure.Description: Electronic Range Select failure shifting lever Down(-)

ElectronicRangeSelectUpFailure.Description: Electronic Range Select failure shifting lever Up(+)

ElectronicRangeSelectReleaseFailure.Description: Electronic Range Select failure Releasing lever

ClusterDisplayFailure.Description: Operator failed cluster gear range display

OutputShaftSpeedLow.Descrption: Output Shaft Speed too low during 2-3 shift

OutputShaftSpeedHigh.Description: Output Shaft Speed too high during 2-3 shift

LiftFootFailure.Description: Foot removed from throttle during 2-3 shift

ThrottlePositionOutOfRangeFailure.Description: Throttle position out of range for 2-3 shift

EngineBrakeThrottlePressed.Description: Throttle pressed during engine braking test

EngineBrakeRPMFail.Description: Engine RPM did not rise enough during engine braking

ReleaseAcceleratorFail.Description: Closed throttle not observed for kickdown test

AfterKickDownGearTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for transmission to kickdown

StompThrottleTimeoutFailure.Description: Timeout waiting for wide open throttle

KickDownLiftFootFail.Description: Foot removed from throttle during kickdown

KickDownOutOfRangeSpeedFailure.Description: Vehicle speed out of range before kickdown observed

NeutralGateFailure.Description: Shift lever position was seen in reverse during neutral gate test

StartBreakInCycleStatusIncorrect.Description: Torque Converter Break-In cycle status not started in module

StopBreakInCycleStatusIncorrect.Description: Torque Converter Break-In cycle status not stopped in module

LowRatioCheck.Description: Low Ratio Value Out of Range

MidRatioCheck.Description: Mid Ratio Value Out of Range

HighRatioCheck.Description: High Ratio Value Out of Range

ValidRatioCheck.Description: One or More Ratio Values Out of Range

AccelerationTestMaxSpeedFailure.Description: vehicle failedto reach max speed in the alotted time
